ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with all fields readable. ICC Certificate of Origin issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Göteborg.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 2 pages. Tetra Pak branded invoice with all fields readable.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-26D-465901 does not contain an LC reference in a bankers context.

criteria_checked.detail: Certificate consignor 'TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA' found in invoice postal address block and VAT registration block on both pages, with matching address CH-1009 Pully.
Certificate consignee 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (PVT) LTD.' found in invoice Consignee field as 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (Pvt) Ltd'.

pairing_validation.motivation: At least two criteria met: consignor and consignee both identifiable in invoice. Document pairing is valid.

consignor.certificate_value: TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA, AV. GENERAL GUISAN 70, 1009, PULLY, SWITZERLAND
consignor.invoice_value: Tetra Pak International SA, P.O. Box 446, CH - 1009 PULLY (postal) / Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully (VAT block)

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate consignor 'TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA' found explicitly in invoice postal address block: 'Tetra Pak International SA, P.O. Box 446, CH - 1009 PULLY' and in VAT registration block: 'Tetra Pak International SA, Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully'. Both match the certificate address 'AV. GENERAL GUISAN 70, 1009, PULLY, SWITZERLAND'. Country Switzerland verified via 'CH-1009' prefix.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice identification blocks
Land verification via indirect identifier – CH prefix in postal code confirms Switzerland

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA' at 'AV. GENERAL GUISAN 70, 1009, PULLY, SWITZERLAND'. The invoice is branded 'Tetra Pak' in header. The invoice buyer is 'Tetra Pak South East Asia Pte Ltd' in Singapore, and the 'From' field is 'Tetra Pak Closures France SNC'. However, applying rule 4.1.0 (Koncernstruktur), the exact name 'Tetra Pak International SA' is found explicitly in the invoice postal address block and VAT registration block on both pages, with the address 'Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully' matching the certificate address. Country Switzerland is confirmed via the CH prefix in the postal code. MATCH via 4.1.0.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignor should match the From field 'Tetra Pak Closures France SNC'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The From field indicates the shipping origin, not the issuing party. Rule 4.1.0 allows identification via any identification block in the invoice. The exact name 'Tetra Pak International SA' is found in the postal and VAT blocks, confirming the consignor.

consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA' with address 'AV. GENERAL GUISAN 70, 1009, PULLY, SWITZERLAND' is explicitly identified in the invoice's postal address block and VAT registration block as 'Tetra Pak International SA' at 'Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully'. The name matches exactly after normalization. Country Switzerland verified via CH prefix. MATCH per rule 4.1.0.

consignee.certificate_value: Silvermill Natural Beverages (PVT) LTD., 148/1 Kynsey Road, COLOMBO 08, Sri Lanka
consignee.invoice_value: Silvermill Natural Beverages (Pvt) Ltd, 148/1 Kynsey Road, 0000980048 COLOMBO 08, SRI LANKA

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has a dedicated 'Consignee' field (primary field)
Compare certificate consignee name with invoice consignee field
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (PVT) LTD.' → normalized: 'silvermill natural beverages (pvt) ltd'. Invoice: 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (Pvt) Ltd' → normalized: 'silvermill natural beverages (pvt) ltd'. Exact match after case normalization.
Certificate: 'Sri Lanka'. Invoice: 'SRI LANKA'. Match after case normalization.

rules_applied.description: Invoice contains explicit 'Consignee' field – used as primary verification target
Name verification after normalization of case and legal form abbreviation (PVT/Pvt, LTD./Ltd)

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (PVT) LTD.' at '148/1 Kynsey Road, COLOMBO 08, Sri Lanka'. Invoice has a dedicated 'Consignee' field containing 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (Pvt) Ltd' at '148/1 Kynsey Road, 0000980048 COLOMBO 08, SRI LANKA'. Name matches exactly after normalization of case and abbreviation format (PVT vs Pvt, LTD. vs Ltd). Address matches. Country Sri Lanka matches. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (PVT) LTD.' is explicitly found in the invoice's dedicated Consignee field as 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (Pvt) Ltd'. Name matches after case normalization. Address 148/1 Kynsey Road, Colombo 08 matches. Country Sri Lanka matches. MATCH per rules 4.2.0.2 and 4.2.2.

goods_description.certificate_value: 576 CARTONS PLASTIC CAPS DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001, HS CODE:392350
goods_description.invoice_value: DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001, Product description: DreamCap Pro 26 mm, Tariff Code 39235090, 576 Cartons

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.result: No explicit article number found in certificate. Certificate does not reference article number A100001410 from the invoice. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify identity-bearing main designation in certificate and verify in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate identity-bearing main designation: 'DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001'. Invoice item description: 'DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001'. Exact match. Additionally, 'PLASTIC CAPS' in certificate is consistent with 'DreamCap Pro 26 mm' product description. HS code 392350 in certificate matches tariff code 39235090 in invoice (cert HS code is a prefix of invoice tariff code). Carton count 576 matches.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation 'DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001' found exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions (PLASTIC CAPS, HS CODE, net weight) do not affect match

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description includes 'DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001' as the identity-bearing main designation. This exact string is found in the invoice item line 10 description. Additional elements in certificate ('576 CARTONS PLASTIC CAPS', 'HS CODE:392350') are confirmed by invoice (576 Cartons in summary, Tariff Code 39235090 which starts with 392350). No article number conflict since certificate does not specify an article number. MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation 'DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001' from the certificate is found exactly in the invoice item description. HS code 392350 is consistent with invoice tariff code 39235090. Package count 576 cartons confirmed. MATCH per rule 4.3.3.

quantity.invoice_value: Gross weight: 6,239.520 KG; Net weight: 4,968 KG

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '6239,520 kgs gross' – this is the primary verification quantity
Certificate GW: 6239.520 kgs (after normalizing comma as decimal separator). Invoice GW: 6,239.520 KG (= 6239.520 KG after removing thousands separator).
Certificate NW: 4,968 kgs. Invoice NW: 4,968 KG.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate NW value '4,968 kgs' = 4968 kgs (comma as thousands separator). Invoice NW '4,968 KG' = 4968 KG. Exact match. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value '6239,520 kgs gross' is the verification-grounding quantity
Gross weight 6239.520 KG verified against invoice gross weight 6,239.520 KG – exact match after normalization
Net weight 4,968 kgs also verified – no contradiction
Thousands separator normalization applied: certificate '4,968' and invoice '4,968' both = 4968; certificate '6239,520' = 6239.520, invoice '6,239.520' = 6239.520

quantity.debug_explanation: Box 7 quantity: '6239,520 kgs gross'. The comma here is a decimal separator (European notation), giving 6239.520 kgs gross weight. Invoice states 'Gross weight 6,239.520 KG' where the comma is a thousands separator (English notation), giving 6239.520 KG. Values match exactly: 6239.520 = 6239.520. Weight category: certificate says 'gross', invoice says 'Gross weight' – consistent. Additionally, certificate Box 6 states 'Net weight: 4,968 kgs'. Here the comma in '4,968' is a thousands separator (since 4.968 kgs would be very small for 576 cartons), giving 4968 kgs net. Invoice states 'Net weight 4,968 KG' = 4968 KG. Exact match. Both GW and NW match – no contradiction per 4.4.3.1. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate '6239,520' could be interpreted as 6239520 kgs (comma as thousands separator)
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: 6239520 kgs (over 6000 metric tons) is unreasonable for 24 pallets of plastic caps. The comma here clearly functions as a decimal separator (European notation), giving 6239.520 kgs which matches the invoice value of 6,239.520 KG exactly.

quantity.motivation: Certificate Box 7 states '6239,520 kgs gross' (= 6239.520 kgs GW). Invoice states 'Gross weight 6,239.520 KG' (= 6239.520 KG GW). Exact match after decimal/thousands separator normalization. Net weight also verified: certificate 4,968 kgs = invoice 4,968 KG = 4968 KG. Both quantities match with no contradictions. MATCH per rules 4.4.3 and 4.4.3.1.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Country of origin of goods: FR; Origin FR (item line)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains 'Country of origin of goods: FR' in summary block and 'Origin FR' at item line level
Certificate: 'FRANCE'. Invoice: 'FR'. FR is the ISO alpha-2 code for France.
France is an EU member state. Certificate origin box says 'FRANCE' not 'EU'. No EU normalization needed since both documents specify France/FR directly.
comparison_steps.result: Direct match – EU normalization not needed

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice via 'Country of origin of goods: FR' and 'Origin FR'

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 states 'FRANCE' as country of origin. Invoice contains two explicit origin fields: 'Country of origin of goods: FR' in the summary block and 'Origin FR' at item line level. FR is the ISO alpha-2 code for France. Direct match after standard country name normalization (FRANCE = FR). Note: The certificate header says 'EUROPEAN UNION' which is the certificate framework, not an origin declaration – origin is specifically 'FRANCE' in Box 3. No non-EU origins in the invoice. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'FRANCE' (Box 3) matches invoice 'Country of origin of goods: FR' and item-level 'Origin FR'. FRANCE = FR via ISO alpha-2 normalization. Single origin, no contradictions. MATCH per rule 4.5.4.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
Consignor and consignee both identifiable in invoice. Pairing valid.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Consignor 'TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA' found in invoice postal address and VAT blocks with matching address CH-1009 Pully.
Switzerland verified via CH prefix in postal code 'CH-1009 PULLY' in the invoice.
Invoice has dedicated 'Consignee' field with matching party.
Names match after case normalization: 'silvermill natural beverages (pvt) ltd'.
Sri Lanka matches after case normalization.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.detail: 'DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001' found exactly in invoice.
Box 7 value '6239,520 kgs gross' identified as primary quantity.
4968 kgs NW = 4,968 KG NW. No contradiction.
Applied to normalize '4,968' (cert) and '4,968' (invoice) as integer 4968; and '6,239.520' (invoice) as 6239.520.
'Country of origin of goods: FR' and 'Origin FR' found in invoice.
ISO alpha-2 code FR normalized to France.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter har verifierats framgångsrikt. Avsändaren Tetra Pak International SA identifieras i fakturans adress- och momsblock med matchande adress i Schweiz. Mottagaren Silvermill Natural Beverages (Pvt) Ltd i Sri Lanka matchar exakt. Varubeskrivningen DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001, bruttovikten 6 239,520 kg och nettovikten 4 968 kg överensstämmer, liksom ursprungslandet Frankrike (FR). Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA, AV. GENERAL GUISAN 70, 1009, PULLY, SWITZERLAND
sections.invoice_value: Tetra Pak International SA, P.O. Box 446, CH - 1009 PULLY / Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully (VAT block)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – konsignörens namn återfunnet explicit i fakturans adress- och momsregistreringsblock med matchande adress
sections.motivation: Certifikatets konsignör 'TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA' med adress Av. General Guisan 70, 1009 Pully, Schweiz finns explicit i fakturans postadressblock och momsblock som 'Tetra Pak International SA' med matchande adress CH-1009 Pully. Land Schweiz bekräftat via CH-prefix.

sections.certificate_value: Silvermill Natural Beverages (PVT) LTD., 148/1 Kynsey Road, COLOMBO 08, Sri Lanka
sections.invoice_value: Silvermill Natural Beverages (Pvt) Ltd, 148/1 Kynsey Road, 0000980048 COLOMBO 08, SRI LANKA
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning i fakturans dedikerade Consignee-fält efter normalisering av versaler och bolagsform
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (PVT) LTD.' matchar exakt fakturans Consignee-fält 'Silvermill Natural Beverages (Pvt) Ltd' efter normalisering av versaler och bolagsförkortning. Adress 148/1 Kynsey Road, Colombo 08 matchar. Land Sri Lanka matchar.

sections.certificate_value: 576 CARTONS PLASTIC CAPS DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001, HS CODE:392350
sections.invoice_value: DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001, Tariff Code 39235090, 576 Cartons
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001' identifierad exakt i fakturan
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'DreamCap26 Pro Blue P2945C PA001' från certifikatet återfinns exakt i fakturans artikelrad. HS-kod 392350 överensstämmer med fakturans tariffkod 39235090. Antal kollin 576 kartonger bekräftat.

sections.invoice_value: Gross weight: 6,239.520 KG; Net weight: 4,968 KG
sections.rule_applied: Direkt förekomstkontroll med normalisering av decimal-/tusentalsavskiljare
sections.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt 6239,520 kgs (europeisk decimalnotation = 6239.520 kg) matchar exakt fakturans bruttovikt 6,239.520 KG (engelska tusentalsavskiljare = 6239.520 kg). Nettovikt 4 968 kgs matchar exakt fakturans 4,968 KG. Båda viktkategorier (GW och NW) verifierade utan motsägelse.

sections.invoice_value: Country of origin of goods: FR; Origin FR
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'FRANCE' (ruta 3) matchar fakturans 'Country of origin of goods: FR' och 'Origin FR' på artikelradsnivå. FRANCE = FR via ISO alfa-2 normalisering. Inga motstridiga ursprungsländer i fakturan.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) har verifierats som MATCH. Certifikatet SEG-26D-465901 överensstämmer med faktura 1201777941. Dokumentparet rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.96. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW. Comparison result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints being MATCH. Workflow recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
